scripts.install:all: npm --prefix services/api-gateway install & npm --prefix services/auth-service install & npm --prefix services/user-service install & npm --prefix services/product-service install & npm --prefix services/order-service install & npm --prefix services/inventory-service install & npm --prefix services/payment-service install & npm --prefix services/kitchen-service install & npm --prefix services/notification-service install & npm --prefix services/analytics-service install & npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "bgCyan.black,bgGreen.black,bgYellow.black,bgBlue.white,bgMagenta.white,bgRed.white,bgWhite.black,bgGray.white,cyan,green,bgBlue.white" --names "GATEWAY,AUTH,USER,PRODUCT,ORDERS,INVENTORY,PAYMENT,KITCHEN,ANALYTICS,NOTIF,FRONTEND" "npm --prefix services/api-gateway run start:dev" "npm --prefix services/auth-service run start:dev" "npm --prefix services/user-service run start:dev" "npm --prefix services/product-service run start:dev" "npm --prefix services/order-service run start:dev" "npm --prefix services/inventory-service run start:dev" "npm --prefix services/payment-service run start:dev" "npm --prefix services/kitchen-service run start:dev" "npm --prefix services/analytics-service run start:dev" "npm --prefix services/notification-service run start:dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
